seoTitle: How to Download and Export a Slack Conversation
metaDescription: Learn how to export Slack chat history through workspace settings, choose a date range, and download the compressed archive for offline backup.
intro: Whether you're archiving discussions before a workspace cleanup or handling a compliance review, exporting your Slack history is done through the administration settings rather than a single conversation menu. This guide walks through opening the export tool, filtering by date range, and downloading the resulting archive so you have a readable backup of your team's public conversations.

steps.heading: Open Settings & Administration
steps.body: Click your workspace name header and select Settings & Administration to access the admin dashboard.

steps.heading: Go to Import & Export Data
steps.body: Inside Workspace Settings, scroll to the security section and click on the Import & Export Data configuration page.

steps.heading: Choose your export type and date range
steps.body: Select the Export tab and review what your plan allows, then use the date range dropdown to pick a preset block or a custom timeframe.

steps.heading: Start the export
steps.body: Click 'Start Export' to let Slack compile the selected channel history into a downloadable archive.

steps.heading: Download and unzip the archive
steps.body: Watch your registered admin email for the completion notice, click the return link, and download the compressed ZIP file once it's ready.

faq.question: Can I export private channels and direct messages?
faq.answer: Standard exports only cover public channels; exporting private channels and DMs typically requires an advanced compliance export available on certain plans.

faq.question: What format is the exported data in?
faq.answer: Slack exports come as a compressed ZIP file containing raw JSON data organized by channel, which may need a third-party viewer to read comfortably.

faq.question: How long does an export take to process?
faq.answer: Processing time varies based on how much history you're exporting, and Slack notifies your admin email once the download link is ready.

faq.question: Do I need admin access to export conversations?
faq.answer: Yes, exporting workspace data is handled through the administration panel and is generally restricted to workspace admins or owners.
